Agentic AI Tools Local admin and editorial operations
Home AI Tools AI Courses Creators Submit page
Operations

Review submissions and manage the catalog.

This local admin page is the next step after the public directory MVP. It gives you a simple workflow to review submissions, approve them into the catalog, and manually create or edit tools without touching HTML.

What this unlocks

Editorial review queue, structured approval, manual catalog editing, and a cleaner path to a future CMS.

Scope

No auth layer yet. This page is intended for local or private deployment while validating the product workflow.

Submission queue

Use the queue to approve submissions into the catalog or reject low-signal entries.

Approve submission

Load a submission from the queue, enrich the listing fields, and approve it into `data/tools.json`.

Create new tool

Use this form to manually create a new listing or edit an existing tool.

Catalog

Load a tool into the editor, then update its metadata without touching the JSON file by hand.

Admin routes: submissions review, manual create, manual update.
Next step after this would be auth and persistence beyond flat files.
